## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Chris Rack's new ventures and fwd.digital's programmatic SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Chris is launching two companies: a demand gen company with a unique AI-driven directory site (SocialView.ai) and Mockingbird.ai for voice AI lead management](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers programmatic SEO services that could potentially accelerate traffic growth for SocialView.ai](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in further discussions, with a demo from fwd.digital as the next step](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Potential synergy identified between Mockingbird.ai's lead qualification capabilities and fwd.digital's high lead volume](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

## Topics

### Chris Rack's Ventures

  - [Demand gen company with SocialView.ai:](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
      - [AI-scraped sentiment analysis from public sources (e.g., Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Aims to provide unbiased company profiles, unlike paid reviews on G2 or TrustRadius](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [Monetization strategy: Sell intent signals based on site traffic](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [MVP goal: Generate enough traffic to prove concept to marketers](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Mockingbird.ai (rebranded from VoiceReach):](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Voice AI for lead management and qualification](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [Potential use case for fwd.digital's high lead volume](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### fwd.digital's Offering

  - [Programmatic SEO services with human expertise guiding AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Claims 2-10x faster results compared to traditional agencies](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Typical engagement: 3-month pilot + 12-month contract](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Current capacity: Only 3 spots available in March, 60+ deals in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Receiving 20-30 leads per week, 5-6 calls per day](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [fwd.digital could help accelerate traffic growth for SocialView.ai](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Chris has $350k in seed funding available for the right opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Both parties see a good fit and are interested in further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)

### Industry Insights

  - [Traditional review sites (G2, TrustRadius, Gartner) lack innovation](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Opportunity for disruption in the B2B software review space](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Jakub Rudnik (former G2 content SEO lead) joined the call, offering potential valuable insights](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to schedule a demo for Chris](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Chris to send more information about Mockingbird.ai](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Explore potential integration of Mockingbird.ai for lead qualification at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Chris to review fwd.digital's offering and discuss with partners/board](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Consider scheduling a follow-up call with Jakub Rudnik for additional insights](https://fathom.video/share/dyujyA-jzX9HGaEUwm3ZR9Jwj_zqzouS?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
